case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. BETTINA ANDERSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67344927) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, BETTINA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, BETTINA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 67304888), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED FEB-07-2022, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, BETTINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2390 FRANCISCO STREET, APT. # 202 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94123 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, *** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67344927)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 67304888), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED FEB-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, BETTINA
